summary: Phase 2 (Module 2 recensement maisons + Module 7 pipeline prospect) tested end-to-end. All 10 backend pytest tests pass (statuses, list_houses w/ score/rank/footprint/breakdown, min_score filter, GET/PATCH /houses/{id}, 400 invalid status, 404 unknown, pipeline overview with counts+hot_prospects filter+sort desc, /stats new fields). Frontend: 6 KPIs (kpi-maisons-detectees=1273, kpi-prospects-actifs=1) render on dashboard; nav-communes/nav-pipeline visible; /pipeline shows 7 kanban columns + hot-prospects-table (1 row Gruffy 73.8 À contacter) with functional commune link. Commune fiche /communes/74099: houses-section, discover-btn, houses-map (leaflet dark) + houses-table (200 rows shown / 500 total), score/status badges/age/surface/% chauffage rendered. Click on house-row opens house-sheet with breakdown, links gmaps/streetview/ign, status select, contact inputs, notes, save-btn. Status change → save → PATCH /api/houses/{id} succeeded and 'Fiche prospect enregistrée' toast displayed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PATCH /houses treats empty strings as 'provided' after model_dump; passing contact_nom='' will overwrite existing value (used intentionally by frontend). OK but document behavior.
GET /api/communes/{code_insee} still does not return computed 'rank' field (flagged in iteration_1) — LOW; unrelated to phase 2.
server.py file is 283 lines with routes, seeding, and helpers mixed; consider splitting routes/houses.py and routes/pipeline.py before it grows further.
seed_data_creation: Modified house 74099-157666273 during UI test then restored to status='a_contacter' (original state per agent context). test_patch_house_full also cleans up its own changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discover endpoint not re-tested on already-seeded communes (74099/74069/73036) per agent instructions. Slow marker test on Doucy-en-Bauges (73101) is defined but skipped by default (deselect via -m 'not slow'). Overpass has known ~15-30s latency + external 502 risk.
